mapper.update: MERGE INTO ow_visit_daily d USING (SELECT TRUNC(SYSDATE) AS vday FROM dual) s ON (d.visit_date = s.vday) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET visit_count = visit_count + 1 WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (visit_date, visit_count) VALUES (s.vday, 1)
mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(visit_date, 'yyyy-mm-dd') AS visit_date, visit_count FROM ow_visit_daily WHERE visit_date >= TRUNC(SYSDATE) - 13 ORDER BY visit_date DESC
